seo_description: Current time in Manama, Bahrain. Arabia Standard Time (AST, UTC+3) year-round — no DST. Same time as Riyadh & Kuwait. Live clock.

faq.question: What time is it in Manama right now?
faq.answer: Manama, Bahrain uses Arabia Standard Time (AST, UTC+3) year-round. Bahrain does not observe Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Asia/Bahrain. Manama shares its time zone with Riyadh (Saudi Arabia), Kuwait City, and Baghdad — all at UTC+3. The live clock above shows the current Manama time.

faq.question: What time zone is Manama in?
faq.answer: Manama, Bahrain is in the Arabia Standard Time zone (AST, UTC+3) year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Bahrain. Bahrain does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Manama shares this time zone with Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Iraq, and Qatar (which also uses UTC+3 year-round as AST).

faq.question: Does Manama observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Manama and Bahrain do not observe Daylight Saving Time. Bahrain uses AST (UTC+3) permanently year-round. The Gulf region — Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, and Oman — does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Manama and London?
faq.answer: Manama (AST, UTC+3) is 3 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1), Manama is 2 hours ahead. Bahrain does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Manama and New York?
faq.answer: Manama (AST, UTC+3) is 8 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Manama is 7 hours ahead. Bahrain does not observe DST.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Manama?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Manama are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM AST, Sunday through Thursday (Friday and Saturday are the weekend). Manama is the capital and financial center of Bahrain. Bahrain is a major financial hub for the Gulf region, hosting numerous international banks and the Bahrain Bourse (BHB). Manama is also home to the Bahrain Financial Harbour complex and Formula 1's Bahrain International Circuit nearby.
